mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vocab_cards (user_id, category, term, meaning, example, example_translation, mastery, next_review_date, tags) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{term}, #{meaning}, #{example}, #{exampleTranslation}, #{mastery}, CURRENT_DATE, CAST(#{tags} AS jsonb))
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, category, term, meaning, example, example_translation, mastery, next_review_date, tags::text, created_at FROM vocab_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, category, term, meaning, example, example_translation, mastery, next_review_date, tags::text, created_at FROM vocab_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND next_review_date <= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY next_review_date ASC
